hero.title:
Help refugees build
a new life in the Netherlands

home.testimonial: "Volunteering changed my life. I've met incredible people and learned so much about resilience."
home.testimonial2: "I started as a language buddy and now I coordinate a whole team. The support from the organisation is amazing."
home.testimonial3: "Every week I help with groceries for elderly refugees. It's a small thing but it means so much to them — and to me."

whatWeDo.title: What Do We Do?
whatWeDo.subtitle: We support refugees and newcomers in building a new life here.

moreInfo.title: More Information
moreInfo.howVolunteeringWorksContent: Sign up online, we review your profile, then we match you with a local team. You'll get an introduction and training before starting. The whole process typically takes 2–3 weeks.
moreInfo.screeningProcessContent: All volunteers undergo a background check and a short interview. This ensures a safe environment for both volunteers and the people we support.
moreInfo.supportForVolunteersContent: We provide training, coaching, and a buddy system for new volunteers. You'll have a coordinator available for any questions.
moreInfo.timeCommitmentContent: Most roles require 2–4 hours per week. We are flexible and can adapt to your schedule. Some roles are project-based.
moreInfo.typesOfRefugeesContent: We work with asylum seekers, status holders, and undocumented individuals. Activities range from legal support to social activities.
moreInfo.faqContent: Do I need to speak Dutch? Not always. What training is provided? Depends on the role. Can I choose my schedule? Yes, we match your availability.
moreInfo.readyToStart: Ready to start? Sign Up Now →

signup.allSetDesc: We'll review your profile and match you with the right team.
